problem: What synthetic material perfectly mimics bone's mechanical and biological properties?
hypothesis: If Perovskite crystal structure optimization is applied to and, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Prototype device testing with 23 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
